seo.title: RRB ALP Recruitment 2026 Apply Online for 11127 Posts
seo.description: Railway RRB ALP Recruitment 2026 notification released for 11127 Assistant Loco Pilot posts. Check eligibility, age limit, important dates, application fee and apply online details.

items.label: For SC / ST / PwBD / Ex-Serviceman Candidates
Fee Refund for General / OBC Candidates
items.amount: ₹400/- after appearing in CBT Stage-I Exam

items.label: Fee Refund for Reserved Category Candidates
items.amount: ₹250/- after appearing in CBT Stage-I Exam

application_fee.note: Application fee can be paid through online mode only.

age_limit.title: Age Limit as 30 January 2026
age_limit.relaxation: Age relaxation will be provided as per Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) rules.

vacancies.title: Vacancy Details
vacancies.short_note: Total 11127 Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) Posts Available
vacancies.note: Candidates are advised to read official notification carefully for complete vacancy details.

eligibility.title: Eligibility Criteria
eligibility.short_eligibility: 10th Pass / ITI / Diploma / Degree Candidates Eligible

rows.qualification: Candidates must have passed Class 10th Examination along with ITI Certificate in relevant trade OR Diploma / Degree in Engineering from recognized institution.

sections.title: Other Eligibility
items: Zone-wise and trade-wise eligibility criteria must be checked carefully through the official notification before applying online.
Candidates must fulfill all medical and physical fitness standards prescribed by Railway Recruitment Board.
Candidates are advised to read the official notification carefully before submitting the online application form.

eligibility.note: Eligibility criteria may vary according to post and railway zone.

selection_process.title: Selection Process
selection_process.note: Selection stages may vary according to post and category.

how_to_apply.title: How To Apply for RRB ALP 2026
steps: Interested candidates who wish to apply for this recruitment can submit their application online before the last date.
Use the Apply Online link provided below under Important Links section to apply directly.
Candidates are advised to read the official notification carefully before filling the application form.
Fill all required details carefully including personal, educational and communication details.
Upload scanned photograph, signature and required documents in prescribed format.
Pay the application fee through available online payment modes if applicable.
Verify all entered details carefully before final submission of the application form.
Take a printout of final submitted application form for future reference.
how_to_apply.note: Candidates are advised to complete the application process before the last date to avoid technical issues.

faq.question: When will the online application for Railway RRB ALP Recruitment 2026 start?
faq.answer: The online application process for Railway RRB ALP Recruitment 2026 started on 15 May 2026.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply online for Railway RRB ALP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form is 14 June 2026.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in Railway RRB ALP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 11,127 Assistant Loco Pilot vacancies have been announced under Railway RRB ALP Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: What is the age limit for Railway RRB ALP Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 to 30 years as on 01 July 2026.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for Railway RRB ALP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed 10th with ITI certificate in relevant trade or possess Diploma / Degree in Engineering.

faq.question: What is the selection process for Railway RRB ALP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes CBT Stage-I, CBT Stage-II, CBAT Aptitude Test, Document Verification, and Medical Examination.

faq.question: What is the application fee for Railway RRB ALP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹500 for General/OBC candidates and ₹250 for SC/ST/PwBD/Ex-Serviceman candidates.

faq.question: What is the official website of Railway Recruitment Board?
faq.answer: The official website of Railway Recruitment Board is https://indianrailways.gov.in/.
